name: Fairway Golf Simulation
address: 4553 N Loop 1604 W Suite 1117, San Antonio, TX 78249
about: Fairway Golf Simulation is an indoor golf facility that combines TrackMan's precision launch monitors with flexible booking options, allowing golfers to practice and play year-round. The facility offers a state-of-the-art space equipped with pro-level technology, providing data-driven insights to help players of all levels improve their game through detailed swing analysis and course play. Membership options are available with no long-term commitments, catering to individuals seeking convenient access to advanced golf simulation technology for practice, play, or instruction.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade TrackMan technology for precise swing analysis
Flexible month-to-month memberships with no long-term commitments
24/7 access to simulators with convenient online booking
Year-round practice regardless of weather conditions
Option to bring guests with certain membership tiers

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch monitors providing detailed swing metrics and ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, but BYOB is not explicitly addressed.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact times, but typical simulator sessions are up to 2-3 hours depending on membership tier.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendly amenities or policies is provided.
